reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify Providence hospital properties with assessed value between $6.9 million and $7.3 million in 2015.
2. From those properties, keep the ones with assessed value in the same range in 2016.
3. From the remaining properties, keep the ones with assessed value in the same range in 2017.
4. From the remaining properties, keep the ones with assessed value in the same range in 2018.
5. From the remaining properties, exclude any whose owner name matches an incorporated Rhode Island city.
6. From the remaining properties, exclude any that are Ivy League universities.
7. For the surviving property, identify the benefactor associated with it and determine whom that benefactor was named after.
8. Using the page for that person, determine the person's grandfather and return the grandfather's name.
original_final_question: Among Providence hospital properties, only one met the following criteria: it had an assessed value consistently between $6.9 million and $7.3 million from 2015 through 2018, and it is neither an Ivy League university nor named after an incorporated Rhode Island city. The benefactor associated with this property was named in honor of another person. Who was that person's grandfather?. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Providence properties with $6.9M-$7.3M assessment in 2015 -> 9 properties
Node 2: Providence properties with $6.9M-$7.3M assessment in 2016 -> 18 properties
Node 3: Providence properties with $6.9M-$7.3M assessment in 2017 -> 19 properties
Node 4: Providence properties with $6.9M-$7.3M assessment in 2018 -> 21 properties
Intersection of nodes 1-4: Properties meeting criterion all 4 years -> {City of Providence, RI Hospital, Brown University}
HOP 2 (d=2, mixed data.gov + Wikipedia - nodes 5-6 filter the intersection):
Node 5 (data.gov): Check if owner name matches incorporated RI city -> only 'City of Providence' matches
Filter: Owner NOT an incorporated RI city -> {RI Hospital, Brown University}
Node 6 (Wikipedia): Brown University -> IS an Ivy League university
Filter: NOT an Ivy League university -> {City of Providence, RI Hospital}
Intersection of filters: {RI Hospital, Brown University} AND {City of Providence, RI Hospital} -> {RI Hospital}
Node 7: Moses Brown Ives created a bequest that provided early funding for Rhode Island Hospital and was named after Moses Brown
Node 8: Moses Brown (after whom Moses Brown Ives was named) had grandfather James Brown (1666-1732)
